creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
New port for xv with japanization.

This port depends graphics/xv port, and RUN_DEPENDS too.

Note that:
  Only japanesized xv binary is installed by this port.
  No man files and document files are installed.
  This is the reason why RUN_DEPENDS.

This PR is uuencoded + tar.gz style.
  $ cd ${PORTSDIR}/graphics
  $ uudecode [this mail]
  $ tar zxvf ports-ja-xv-3.10a.tar.gz

Thank you!

--- shige
